_comment: Sector starter policy packs (F047). The catalog (GET /policy-packs) + 'enable pack' backend read THIS manifest + the referenced rego. Enabling a pack materializes its rego as the namespace's (ns,__pack__) policy via the normal policy-create path (default-OFF until enabled). STARTER templates — customers tune the listed verbs/thresholds in the materialized policy. rule_ids here are the real rule_id values the rego emits (and appear in category_mapping.json).

packs.title: Energy OT/IT Segmentation
packs.enforces: Fail-safe OT surface: hard-blocks control commands in tool name OR params (breaker/relay/recloser/setpoint, modbus write_register, dnp3 direct_operate, valve/pump/tap); escalates OT-adjacent OMS/ADMS writes and any OT-surface tool that is not a clear read; allows IT reads.

packs.title: Finance Money-Movement & Segregation of Duties
packs.enforces: Escalates money movement over a threshold and transfers to new/unverified beneficiaries; blocks same-identity initiate+approve (SoD). Pair with the PCI cardholder-data rules.

packs.title: Healthcare Clinical Safety & Minimum-Necessary PHI
packs.enforces: Escalates clinical-action tools (order/prescribe/modify chart) for human sign-off; blocks bulk-PHI reads over a threshold and PHI identifiers on egress tools. Builds on hipaa_phi.

packs.title: Government Rights-Impacting & CUI/FTI
packs.enforces: Escalates rights-impacting decisions (benefit deny/approve, adjudication) for human review; blocks CUI/FTI markings (SSN/tax) on egress tools.

packs.title: Telecom SIM-Swap & CPNI Protection
packs.enforces: Escalates SIM-swap / number-port without a verified strong-auth flag; blocks bulk CPNI/location reads over a threshold.
